story.label: The Dream · Our Story
story.pullquote: The most profound hospitality is not about service. It is about place.
story.body1: Green Horizon sits on a cliff above the Bulgarian Black Sea — between ancient forest and open water, shaped by four elements that have governed this coast for millennia.
story.body2: This is not a hotel that appeared fully formed. It is being built, slowly, by one family who believes a place should earn its story before it tells it.
story.body3: We are still building. We would like you to follow.

elements.label: The Four Elements
elements.intro: The cliff gives you four ways to feel alive.

earth.title: Earth
earth.body: The ancient volcanic cliff. Forest floor to the edge. Grounded before it reaches the sky.

water.title: Water
water.body: The Black Sea below — with at least twelve nations at its floor. Older, calmer, and less charted than you expect.

fire.title: Fire
fire.body: A table lit at golden hour. Light as warmth. Dinner as the longest part of the day.

air.title: Air
air.body: Open sky. The lightness of sitting somewhere high. Space that opens your chest.

items.label: The Forest
items.title: Strandzha Walks
items.body: The oldest forest in Europe stands behind the cliff. Oak, hornbeam, and summer silence.

items.label: The Shore
items.title: Sunrise on the Dunes
items.body: The Black Sea coast at dawn is pale, still, and unmarked. Walk it before anyone else arrives.

items.label: The Sea
items.title: The Sea at Dusk
items.body: A boat, an anchor, a view of the cliff from water level. Dusk over forty-two degrees north.

journey.label: The Build · Live Updates
journey.heading: The cliff has been rising above the treeline since April 2024.

entries.title: The terrace foundations are set.
entries.body: The concrete pours are done on the Water terrace. First view of what the sitting position will feel like from the edge.

entries.title: The Earth suite walls reach two metres.
entries.body: Stone sourced from the cliff itself — dark volcanic basalt, not imported render. The colour matches what was already there.
entries.imageAlt: Earth suite walls under construction, March 2025

entries.title: The first oak frame goes up.
entries.body: Local timber. A carpenter from Tsarevo who has been building in the Strandzha for thirty years. No plans, just a conversation and a tape measure.

rooms.label: The Suites
rooms.heading: Four rooms. Four elements.

items.name: The Earth Suite
items.body: Stone floor. Forest ceiling. A private deck that ends at the treeline.

items.name: The Water Suite
items.body: Full sea view. A bathtub that faces the horizon. Silence with depth.

items.name: The Fire Suite
items.body: An open hearth. South-facing warmth. The longest evenings in Bulgaria.

items.name: The Air Suite
items.body: Highest on the cliff. Open sky on three sides. Nowhere to look but out.

rooms.villas_note: Six private villas also available — each with its own approach to the sea.

register.heading: Be first on the horizon.
register.body: Green Horizon opens in 2026. Register your interest for early access to room selection, updates from the build, and a first offer from the team.

footer.tagline: A family place on the Black Sea.
